freebsd 11 crash backtrace

Trying to install FreeBSD 11-SNAPSHOT in Parallels on Mac. Selected ZFS root and got a crash due to fault in kernel. Attached is the screenshot showing the backtrace.

Using:
FreeBSD-11.0-CURRENT-amd64-20150217-r278908-disc1.iso
